title_en: Persona 5 Royal Headlines Xbox Game Pass June 2026 Wave 1
summary_en: Microsoft has confirmed the lineup of games coming to Xbox Game Pass during the first half of June, which is headlined by the arrival of Persona 5 Royal.
body_en:
Microsoft has confirmed the lineup of games coming to Xbox Game Pass during the first half of June, which is headlined by the arrival of Persona 5 Royal.
It's a much quieter start to the month following the arrival of Forza Horizon 6 on Xbox Game Pass in May , though who knows — more upcoming additions may be revealed this weekend when Microsoft takes the stage for its annual Xbox Games Showcase.
In the meantime, today's Xbox Wire blog lists a string of games for the coming weeks, including floating island survival game Solarpunk, boxing title Undisputed, and cozy life sim meets deckbuilding puppet adventure Beastro (not Balatro, as I initially read). Then there's co-op extraction puzzle-platformer Frog Sqwad and 3D action platformer Junkster.
Day One launches include the early access arrival of Starseeker: Astroneer Expeditions, a new co-op game set within the Astroneer universe with a focus on teamwork. Herdling and Total Chaos join Xbox Game Pass Premium, meanwhile, after previously having been available to Game Pass PC and Ultimate subscribers.
Whenever Microsoft giveth, it also taketh away. Here are the games leaving Xbox Game Pass over the next month.
Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
